_README: COMMITTED TEMPLATE — do NOT put real values here. Real per-deployment values (github_org / aws_profile / aws_region, and owner_project / default_scope when not 'workspace') go in a sibling config.local.json, which is gitignored and overlays this file at load time (local keys win). This lets `/setup-workspace sync` refresh config.json without clobbering your settings. First-run setup (SKILL.md Step 0) prompts for the values and writes config.local.json for you. The scripts fail fast with a clear message when a required value is missing — wrong values do not silently misroute outputs.

_doc.owner_project: Project slug whose artifacts/security-snapshot/ holds this skill's load-bearing dashboard + snapshot history, or 'workspace'.
_doc.default_scope: Scope used when --scope is not passed at the CLI. Resolves to <workspace>/projects/<scope>/artifacts/security-snapshot/ for a project slug, or <workspace>/artifacts/security-snapshot/ for the literal string 'workspace'.
_doc.github_org: GitHub organization to scan (REQUIRED). All repos in the org are enumerated.
_doc.aws_profile: AWS CLI/boto3 profile with Inspector2 + STS read access (REQUIRED). Read-only credentials recommended.
_doc.aws_region: AWS region where Inspector V2 runs (REQUIRED).
_doc.dashboard_title: Title shown in the dashboard header and browser tab. Optional — defaults to 'Security Dashboard'.
_doc.annotations: Event markers rendered as vertical lines on the Trend tab. Each entry: {date: YYYYMMDD, label: text}. Optional — empty list is fine.
